mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product p WHERE

SELECT p.id, p.product_no, p.product_name, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.sale_price, p.stock_quantity, p.stock_warn_threshold, p.status, p.created_at FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.product_no, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.product_name, p.sub_title, p.brand_name, p.unit_name, p.main_image, p.sale_price, p.cost_price, p.market_price, p.stock_quantity, p.stock_warn_threshold, p.status, p.audit_status, p.remark, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.merchant_id = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET is_deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
